_comment_meta: Snapshot of the production RTDB rules taken on 2026-05-13 BEFORE the v3.3 phase-1 deploy. Use this file to roll back if the new rules cause unexpected permission-denied errors in production.
_comment_security_note: These rules contain a known privacy weakness: `users/.read: true` exposes every user's tree to every authenticated user. The v3.3 phase-1 rules in database.rules.json close that hole. Do NOT keep these rules as the long-term baseline.
_comment_rollback_command: firebase deploy --only database --project municion-95caa -- using `firebase database:set / docs/firebase_rules_rollback.json` after a temporary rename. See docs/firebase_rules_deploy.md §Emergency rollback.
